channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: Google's Nest Hub has no clue what time it is, and it's messing with our heads
item.description: A Nest Hub user reported a strange issue, as their device finds it difficult to tell the time correctly.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Google Nest Hub 2nd gen with time and wallpaper displayed
media:content.media:text: Google Nest Hub 2nd gen with time and wallpaper displayed
media:content.media:title: Google Nest Hub 2nd gen with time and wallpaper displayed

item.title: Honor Connect, photography updates carry the Magic 8 Pro's huge April patch
item.description: Honor's Magic 8 Pro is receiving a huge April update, which rolls out Honor Connect for phone-to-Mac transfers, camera updates, and much more.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Magic OS 10 logo on the Honor Magic 8 Pro
media:content.media:text: The Magic OS 10 logo on the Honor Magic 8 Pro
media:content.media:title: The Magic OS 10 logo on the Honor Magic 8 Pro

item.title: The Moto G Power (2025) is a solid budget phone with a few surprises — and it's FREE at Straight Talk Wireless
item.description: Add a line with an eligible unlimited plan and Straight Talk Wireless will give you the 2025 Moto G Power for FREE.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: The Moto G Power 2025 display outdoors
media:content.media:text: The Moto G Power 2025 display outdoors
media:content.media:title: The Moto G Power 2025 display outdoors

item.title: Samsung's XR glasses snuck into One UI 9, putting launch back on the menu
item.description: Samsung's XR glasses to compete against Meta reportedly surfaced in an early One UI 9 build, and a launch is back on our minds.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Android XR glasses background video
media:content.media:text: Android XR glasses background video
media:content.media:title: Android XR glasses background video

item.title: Nothing's Essential Voice redefined how I talk to my phone, and it's about time someone fixed this problem
item.description: The Nothing Phone 3 and Nothing Phone 4a Pro just launched a new feature called Essential Voice, and it's going to transform how Nothing users type.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: Essential Voice on the Nothing Phone 4a Pro
media:content.media:text: Essential Voice on the Nothing Phone 4a Pro
media:content.media:title: Essential Voice on the Nothing Phone 4a Pro

item.title: YouTube on mobile makes livestream ads way less annoying, but there's a caveat
item.description: YouTube now keeps livestreams visible during ads, but mutes the audio — so you won’t miss the action, just everything you’re supposed to hear.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: YouTube logo on mobile screen
media:content.media:text: YouTube logo on mobile screen
media:content.media:title: YouTube logo on mobile screen

item.title: Verizon brings back bundle deal that gets you a free Samsung Galaxy S26 Plus, Galaxy Watch 8, AND $100 gift card - so what's the catch?
item.description: Verizon is bringing back a deal that will give you a free smartwatch or tablet when you purchase an eligible smartphone. Oh, and there's a gift card up for grabs too.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Holding the Galaxy S26 Plus outside
media:content.media:text: Holding the Galaxy S26 Plus outside
media:content.media:title: Holding the Galaxy S26 Plus outside

item.title: Google's Android 17 preview may have spilled Pixel 11 Pro Fold details
item.description: Google's Android 17 beta build may have exposed a few details about its next foldable.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Google Pixel 10 Pro Fold Review
media:content.media:text: Google Pixel 10 Pro Fold Review
media:content.media:title: Google Pixel 10 Pro Fold Review

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 vs. Galaxy Z Fold 7: Worth waiting for?
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 should arrive in late July and the leaks so far aren't painting the most exciting picture. Will it be worth the upgrade over the Galaxy Z Fold 7?
item.author: roydon.cerejo@gmail.com (Roydon Cerejo)
item.dc:creator: Roydon Cerejo

media:content.media:description: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 propped up on a bush
media:content.media:text: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 propped up on a bush
media:content.media:title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 propped up on a bush

item.title: YouTube TV vs. Hulu Plus Live TV: the battle of the cable alternatives
item.description: YouTube TV and Hulu + Live are two of the best live TV streaming services in the business. But how do they differ, and which is the better alternative to cable?
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: YouTube TV and Disney Plus apps
media:content.media:text: YouTube TV and Disney Plus apps
media:content.media:title: YouTube TV and Disney Plus apps

item.title: These 3 Samsung Messages features will be hard to give up — but switching to Google Messages might not be all bad
item.description: Samsung Messages is shutting down, but thankfully, Google Messages offers several useful features.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: An AI generated wallpaper on the home screen of a Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra
media:content.media:text: An AI generated wallpaper on the home screen of a Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra
media:content.media:title: An AI generated wallpaper on the home screen of a Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra

item.title: Will the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 support Qi2 magnetic charging?
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 is rumored to launch this summer, and the expectation is that it will probably remain Qi2 ready.
item.author: christinep2424@gmail.com (Christine Persaud)
item.dc:creator: Christine Persaud

media:content.media:description: A leaked render of the supposed Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide in a black colorway, showing its wider cover and inner displays and a dual camera array.
media:content.media:text: A leaked render of the supposed Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide in a black colorway, showing its wider cover and inner displays and a dual camera array.
media:content.media:title: A leaked render of the supposed Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide in a black colorway, showing its wider cover and inner displays and a dual camera array.

item.title: Moto G Stylus 2026 vs. Google Pixel 10a: Which is the best phone under $500?
item.description: The Moto G Stylus 2026 2026 vs. Google Pixel 10a is a fair fight between two phones that both come in at under $500.
item.author: christinep2424@gmail.com (Christine Persaud)
item.dc:creator: Christine Persaud

media:content.media:description: Google Pixel 10a in mint color in front of green leaves
media:content.media:text: Google Pixel 10a in mint color in front of green leaves
media:content.media:title: Google Pixel 10a in mint color in front of green leaves

item.title: One bankruptcy just wiped out a popular Google TV lineup in Europe
item.description: Thomson’s European Google TV maker went bankrupt owing €36 million, so don't hold your breath for that new streaming box.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Google TV Streaming Box 260 PRO (4K) box and remote next to a TV
media:content.media:text: Google TV Streaming Box 260 PRO (4K) box and remote next to a TV
media:content.media:title: Google TV Streaming Box 260 PRO (4K) box and remote next to a TV

item.title: I finally got a handle on my expenses thanks to this AI feature on the Find X9 Ultra
item.description: The Find X9 Ultra has a new AI Bill Manager feature that makes managing bills about as easy as it gets. This is what you need to know about the AI-assisted budgeting feature.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: AI Bill Manager on the Find X9 Ultra
media:content.media:text: AI Bill Manager on the Find X9 Ultra
media:content.media:title: AI Bill Manager on the Find X9 Ultra

item.title: Nothing's giving its phones an Essential Voice to usher in smarter transcriptions
item.description: Nothing drops another feature for its latest phones, aiming to provide an Essential Voice for smarter transcriptions.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Nothing Phone 4a Pro Silver cameras from the launch in London
media:content.media:text: Nothing Phone 4a Pro Silver cameras from the launch in London
media:content.media:title: Nothing Phone 4a Pro Silver cameras from the launch in London

item.title: Meta gives parents a way to see what their teens are asking its AI
item.description: Meta now lets parents see the topics teens discuss with its AI, offering more visibility without full chats.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: A Meta AI logo on a laptop with a pair of Ray-Ban Meta Smart Glasses in front
media:content.media:text: A Meta AI logo on a laptop with a pair of Ray-Ban Meta Smart Glasses in front
media:content.media:title: A Meta AI logo on a laptop with a pair of Ray-Ban Meta Smart Glasses in front

item.title: The end of Fitbit? Google Health may be ready to take the reins
item.description: Evidence suggests Fitbit Premium could become Google Health Premium.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

item.title: Meta Quest just got closer to being a proper TV replacement
item.description: The new DIRECTV app brings live and on-demand TV content to Meta Quest devices.

item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: DIRECTV running on Meta Quest

item.title: These UAG cases fix the biggest issue with the Galaxy S26 Ultra
item.description: You need to use a case with the Galaxy S26 Ultra, and UAG's latest rugged cases have stylish designs while delivering reliable protection.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

item.title: Grab a seat: Google's next Android Show premieres soon, and there's major hype
item.description: Google started teasing what's coming up for its Android Show just before I/O 2026 takes center stage.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

item.title: Another round of Fitbit AI health coach updates targets customization to fit your goals
item.description: Fitbit discussed a few more personal health coach updates rolling out soon that aim to make its assistance more personalized.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Fitbit Personal Health Coach preview Today tab

item.title: This Garmin watch completely changed how I run, and it just got a massive discount at Best Buy
item.description: Despite its age, the Garmin Forerunner 265S is a sleek, versatile fitness watch that could totally transform your exercise regimen.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Garmin Forerunner 265 watch face
media:content.media:text: Garmin Forerunner 265 watch face
media:content.media:title: Garmin Forerunner 265 watch face

item.title: One Meta Quest game is reviving my love for multiplayer gaming
item.description: Forefront is Battlefield on steroids, putting gamers in 32-player matches with giant maps, vehicles, classes, tons of weapons, and more, all in glorious VR.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:credit: Original screenshot: Triangle Factory, edits: Nicholas Sutrich
media:content.media:description: Me riding a jetski in Forefront while wearing a Meta Quest 3 headset
media:content.media:text: Me riding a jetski in Forefront while wearing a Meta Quest 3 headset
media:content.media:title: Me riding a jetski in Forefront while wearing a Meta Quest 3 headset

item.title: Samsung just made the Galaxy Z Fold 7 and Flip 7 slightly easier on your wallet
item.description: Samsung’s refurbished Fold 7 and Flip 7 sound like a deal, but base models cost more than new ones.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

item.title: OnePlus quietly drops a great smartwatch while its global business is in limbo
item.description: OnePlus quietly dropped a titanium Watch 4 with Wear OS 6, but good luck buying one before the company possibly implodes.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

item.title: Android 17 isn't out yet, but Google is already testing its first big update
item.description: Android 17 QPR1 Beta is now available for Pixel 6 and newer devices.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: The Android 17 logo on a Google Pixel 10 Pro XL
media:content.media:text: The Android 17 logo on a Google Pixel 10 Pro XL
media:content.media:title: The Android 17 logo on a Google Pixel 10 Pro XL

item.title: Meta's Threads is going live with chats for big moments, like the NBA Finals
item.description: Threads announced Live Chats for big cultural moments, like the NBA Playoffs and Finals, which are rolling out just in time.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Meta's Threads rolls out Live Chats, which will begin for the NBA Playoffs and Finals, giving users a chance to interact with others in real-time, chatting about the game, sharing photos, and videos.
media:content.media:text: Meta's Threads rolls out Live Chats, which will begin for the NBA Playoffs and Finals, giving users a chance to interact with others in real-time, chatting about the game, sharing photos, and videos.
media:content.media:title: Meta's Threads rolls out Live Chats, which will begin for the NBA Playoffs and Finals, giving users a chance to interact with others in real-time, chatting about the game, sharing photos, and videos.

item.title: Workspace Intelligence is Google's agentic AI era for true assistance with Gemini
item.description: Google's Cloud Next 2026 event detailed an agentic AI future with Workspace Intelligence for subscribers across its apps.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Google announced Workspace Intelligence, a new agentic AI software to help users automate complex tasks and projects with ease.
media:content.media:text: Google announced Workspace Intelligence, a new agentic AI software to help users automate complex tasks and projects with ease.
media:content.media:title: Google announced Workspace Intelligence, a new agentic AI software to help users automate complex tasks and projects with ease.

item.title: Ultrahuman, Les Mills partner for a PowerPlug that pushes you—if you can take it
item.description: Ultrahuman announced a studio-quality partnership with Les Mills, as well as new biomarker data recommendations to push you further (and smarter).
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Ultrahuman announces partnership with Les Mills to bring studio-quality workouts and biomarker data for improved recommendations for the next day.

media:content.media:title: Ultrahuman announces partnership with Les Mills to bring studio-quality workouts and biomarker data for improved recommendations for the next day.

item.title: Rumored open-ear Galaxy Buds 'Able' may use your bones to make sound

item.title: The Honor 600 Pro is so good that it surprised me — this iPhone 17 Pro lookalike has a unique AI feature that all phones need to steal
item.description: A unique AI feature, coupled with outstanding hardware and specs, makes the Honor 600 Pro surprisingly compelling.

item.dc:creator: Nirave Gondhia

item.title: The new Honor 600 series brings flagship cameras and upgraded AI features
item.description: A familiar design and familiar specs make for a compelling phone.

media:content.media:description: The Honor 600 Pro in orange in a lifestyle image

item.title: I’ve spent a week with the Honor 600, and honestly? I’m starting to wonder why anyone still pays four figures for a flagship
item.description: The Honor 600 is one of the best mid-range phones ever, often pushing the boundaries with flagship-grade specs.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: The back of a white Honor 600 with coral flowers in the background
media:content.media:text: The back of a white Honor 600 with coral flowers in the background

item.title: Samsung raised prices on the Galaxy S26, and it doesn't seem to matter

item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

item.title: Xiaomi's latest TV proves that QD-Mini LED tech is the future of TVs
item.description: Xiaomi has a new QD-Mini LED TV, and after using it for just over a week, I'm convinced that Mini LED tech is the ideal choice if you're looking to get a new TV this year.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

item.title: Samsung is heavily discounting its older smart TVs to make room for 2026 stock — save up to $1,600 with these deals!

item.title: Gemini keeps its ears open for 'Continued Conversations' in Google Home
item.description: Gemini no longer shuts you out, as "Continued Conversations" lets you keep talking without having to repeat yourself.

item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

item.title: T-Mobile is apparently giving away the Galaxy Watch 8 for FREE with new deal — here's how to claim yours

item.title: I tested the OPPO Find X9 Ultra, and it's undoubtedly the new king of camera phones
item.description: I used the Find X9 Ultra as my daily driver for just under two weeks, and I'm convinced that this is the ultimate camera flagship of 2026.

item.title: A perfect ten: Galaxy S25 users get a One UI 8.5 Beta 10 that's hopefully its last
item.description: Samsung was spotted rolling out its tenth One UI 8.5 beta for Galaxy S25 users, which could indicate a stable launch looms.

item.title: Google Photos wants to fix your face in one tap, but I’m not sure people want the help
item.description: Google Photos’ new AI touch-ups make quick, natural-looking selfie fixes effortless, but they quietly push us toward more polished, less real photos.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Google Photos logo on mobile screen
media:content.media:text: Google Photos logo on mobile screen
media:content.media:title: Google Photos logo on mobile screen

item.title: Apple's Tim Cook is stepping down as CEO later this year — here's the Apple veteran next up
item.description: Tim Cook will step down as Apple CEO on Sept. 1, 2026, ending a 15-year run at the company's helm. A longtime Apple engineer is set to take over.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: The incoming and outgoing Apple CEOs.
media:content.media:text: The incoming and outgoing Apple CEOs.
media:content.media:title: The incoming and outgoing Apple CEOs.
